title: T-076 — DEFERRED/CROSS-MODULE: Sensory UI is Technical-owned (do not BUILD in NPD)
prompt:
# T-076 — DEFERRED/CROSS-MODULE Sensory UI

Do not implement this as an NPD UI build task. Per 2026-05-03 PO decision, Sensory belongs under Technical. This task is retained only as a backlog guard so agents do not build the older standalone NPD SensoryScreen.

Required handling: route any sensory UI/data work to Technical. NPD may later consume a Technical-owned sensory status/read-model for approval/gating visibility.

pipeline_inputs.description: Deferred guard task: do not build standalone NPD SensoryScreen; Sensory is Technical-owned per 2026-05-03 PO decision.
pipeline_inputs.details: Sensory UI is Technical-owned; NPD may show read-only Technical status later only.
scope_files: No application files — task is blocked/deferred pending Technical-owned sensory UI/contract
out_of_scope: Do not create apps/web NPD sensory route or components from this task
Do not implement radar chart / attribute bars / panel comments as standalone NPD UI
Do not enforce V08 sensory gate in NPD without Technical-owned contract
acceptance_criteria: No standalone NPD sensory UI files are created by this guard task.
When sensory is not required, NPD UI/approval shows N/A/not_required.
When required by org policy, future UI displays Technical-owned status and remediation link only.

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: No implementation tests in NPD; validate by backlog/PR review that no standalone NPD SensoryScreen is built from this task.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not build standalone NPD SensoryScreen.
Do not paste or port old sensory prototype into NPD as active scope.
Do not contradict Technical ownership of Sensory.
pipeline_inputs.prototype_index_entry: sensory_screen (reference only; not NPD build scope)
